productDisplayName: Timberland Men Falmouth Cycling Jac Black Jacket
description: CompositionRipstop jacket in 100% nylon, two front zip side pockets, chest zip pocket on left side, broad storm flap at centre placket, hood with brim and inner bungee cord keeps out rain and wind, understated timberland logos at left chest, right sleeve and upper back, hook-and-loop tabs at cuffsFittingSlimWash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry normal at low heat Warm iron when needed Dry cleanable timberland's Waterproof Ripstop Jacket uses coated ripstop nylon, an adjustable hood with long brim and storm flaps to help keep you dry through sudden rainstorms. Three zippered pockets will keep your trail mix, wallet and compass safe and dry, and ripstop nylon won't rip even if a wayward branch or sharp rock sneaks up on you during your outdoor adventures.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in JacketHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
